metadata.significance: Tells of Abraha's failed attack on Kaaba with elephants, year of Prophet's birth

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْفِيلِ
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka biashabi alfeeli

translations.en_sahih: Have you not considered, [O Muhammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant?
translations.en_yusufali: Seest thou not how thy Lord dealt with the Companions of the Elephant?
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidakkah engkau mengetahui bagaimana Tuhanmu telah melakukan kepada angkatan tentera (yang dipimpin oleh pembawa) Gajah, (yang hendak meruntuhkan Kaabah)?

translations.en_sahih: Did He not make their plan into misguidance?
translations.en_yusufali: Did He not make their treacherous plan go astray?
translations.ms_basmeih: Bukankah Tuhanmu telah menjadikan rancangan jahat mereka dalam keadaan yang rugi dan memusnahkan mereka?

translations.en_sahih: And He sent against them birds in flocks,
translations.en_yusufali: And He sent against them Flights of Birds,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Ia telah menghantarkan kepada mereka (rombongan) burung berpasuk-pasukan, -

translations.en_sahih: Striking them with stones of hard clay,
translations.en_yusufali: Striking them with stones of baked clay.
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang melontar mereka dengan batu-batu dari sejenis tanah yang dibakar keras, -

translations.en_sahih: And He made them like eaten straw.
translations.en_yusufali: Then did He make them like an empty field of stalks and straw, (of which the corn) has been eaten up.
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu Ia menjadikan mereka hancur berkecai seperti daun-daun kayu yang dimakan ulat.
